REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GORROD, WILLIAM ROZENSZTASN, ROMINA

"THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED, BOTH COMPLAINT AND CROSS--COMPLAINT. PARTIES AGREE TO WAIVE ANY FURTHER CLAIMS THEY MIGHT HAVE ARISING OUT OF THIS TENANCY", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT ROMINA S. ROZENSZTAJN WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON THE CROSS--COMPLAINT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
